text.title: django-pytest-factories Procedure
text.summary: Five steps to a validated factories spec.

step.name: enumerate-factories
step.action: For each domain model that participates in tests: declare a <Model>Factory.

step.name: wire-subfactories
step.action: For each FK in the model: add a `subfactories` entry like "customer=CustomerFactory".

step.name: add-post-generation
step.input: Models with M2M / password / file-upload / computed fields.
step.action: Add post_generation hook names (e.g., "set_password", "attach_tags"). For Django ≥ 4.2, set skip_postgeneration_save=true.

step.name: scope-mute-signals
step.action: For each factory whose model has external-effect post_save handlers (email, Celery, audit): set mute_signals=true. Reserve signal-handler testing for separate tests.

step.name: register-and-validate
step.action: List register() calls in conftest.py. Emit factories-spec.json; run scripts/validate-django-pytest-factories.py.
